overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing first-person exploration of a sunlit wetland and prairie. The player walks through marshy creeks and tall grass, passing a horse rider before approaching a rural farmstead with a windmill.

events.description: game UI displays Common Bulrush herb identification prompt

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through tall grass near the creek examining plants

entered.detail: shallow stream with reflective water flowing through grass
dense green grass swaying in the wind
tree line on the horizon under bright sun

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit marsh with a shallow creek running through dense tall grass. The bright morning sun creates a hazy glow as the camera moves forward through the wetland, with a forest visible in the distant left.

events.description: character transitions from water to dry grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through tall grass toward higher ground

entered.detail: tall metal windmill structure on the horizon
gentle green slopes extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving from the marsh into drier grassland, the terrain gradually rises into rolling hills. A windmill becomes visible on the distant horizon as the camera continues forward through the swaying prairie grass.

events.description: horse and rider appear moving across the grassland
approaching wooden farm buildings and windmill structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the farmstead while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback moving across the grassland from right to left

entered.detail: weathered wooden farm building with sloped roof
wooden fence lining the property boundary

segments.scene_description: A horse and rider pass by on the right as the camera approaches a rural farmstead. Wooden barns and a prominent windmill come into view, marking the transition from open prairie to settled farmland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit wetland that gradually transitions into a settled rural farmstead. It begins in a marshy creek surrounded by dense tall grass, moving forward through a hazy morning glow with a distant forest visible to the left. As the camera leaves the wetland, the terrain rises into drier grassland and rolling hills, where a distant windmill first appears on the horizon. The scene then shifts across the swaying prairie grass as a horse and rider pass by on the right, before finally arriving at a farmstead featuring wooden barns and a prominent windmill.
